entryA.symptom: SCEP certificate fails to renew on a subset of Windows devices while others renew successfully
entryA.solution: Use Procmon to diagnose: 1) Filter for Process Name=dmcertinst.exe and Path contains SCEP policy ID (replace - with _). 2) Look for error codes, use certutil /error or https://windowsinternalservices.

entryB.symptom: Windows intermediate certificate deployment via Intune failed with error code 0x86000031.
entryB.solution: Engage Windows EE for investigation. Error 0x86000031 in certificate deployment is typically customer-side. Verify certificate chain, template settings, and NDES/SCEP configuration.

entryB.symptom: Managed apps on iOS device prompts users to configure a device PIN when only App Protection Policies are targeted. When the Encrypt App data policy is configured, even without the Require PIN for Acce
entryB.solution: Configure the Encrypt App data policy to Use device settings if the IT Pro does not want iOS users to be required to set a device PIN.

entryA.solution: Either disable MDM auto-enrollment in Azure, or uninstall the PC agent or SCCM client agent. Once this is done the Azure AD join operation should complete successfully.

entryB.symptom: Windows enrollment fails with error 8018000a The device is already enrolled. Another user has already enrolled or joined the device to Entra ID.
entryB.solution: Sign in with the other account that enrolled/joined the device. Go to Settings > Accounts > Work Access and remove the work or school connection. Sign back in with your account and retry enrollment.

entryA.solution: Either disable MDM auto-enrollment in Azure, or uninstall the PC agent or SCCM client agent. Once this is done the Azure AD join operation should complete successfully.

entryB.symptom: Windows 10 GP-based auto-enrollment fails with 0x80180002b. dsregcmd /status shows AzureAdPrt=NO and incorrect TenantId/AuthCodeUrl.
entryB.solution: dsregcmd /leave, delete device in Entra, unjoin from AD, delete device from DC, rejoin AD, delta sync, verify AzureAdJoined/DomainJoined/AzureAdPrt=YES, gpupdate /force.
